# Stock Dashboard Project

## Project Overview

A modern, mobile-responsive stock dashboard built with React and TypeScript. Displays real-time stock data with a clean, professional interface.

## Key Features

- Mobile responsive design
- Real-time stock data display
- Modern UI with gradient backgrounds
- TypeScript for type safety
- Fast Vite build system

## Tech Stack

- React 18 with TypeScript
- Vite for build tooling
- CSS3 with responsive design
- ESLint for code quality

## Development Setup

1. Install dependencies: `npm install`
2. Start dev server: `npm run dev`
3. Build for production: `npm run build`
4. Preview build: `npm run preview`

## Project Structure

- `src/App.tsx` - Main dashboard component
- `src/data/` - Stock data (currently mock NVDA data)
- `src/App.css` - Responsive styling
- Development server runs on `http://localhost:5173/`

## Current Status

✅ Project scaffolded and running
✅ Mobile responsive design implemented
✅ NVDA stock data displayed
✅ Development server configured
✅ Build process working

## Next Steps

- Integrate real stock API
- Add multiple stock symbols
- Implement charts and graphs
- Add watchlist functionality
